content_body: We decided to take a nice long Mothers' Day weekend in the nearby mountains, and that it was. The cabin was actually much nicer than the pictures projected. We enjoyed the terrace wood burning fireplaces at nights. The kitchen and cooking and plates and utensils were all nice quality; no chipped plates or glasses. The path to the river bank had several switchbacks and made it relatively easy go back and forth (but not for a wheelchair.) My grandson was just elated to go down to the river to throw rocks, and the scenic train made the Thomas the Tank Engine fan very happy. Thanks again for the well maintained cabin, and I am sure we will be there again.
title: Enjoyed It Tremendously
